---
title: "CV"
---

[Download CV (PDF)](assets/CV.pdf)

**Education**
- PhD, Psychology (Quantitative Methods), University Name, Year
- MA, Psychology, University Name, Year
- BS, Psychology, University Name, Year

**Appointments**
- Assistant Professor, Department, University, Years

**Selected Publications**
- Harris, M. (2026). *Title of Paper*. Journal.
- Harris, M., & Coauthor, A. (2025). *Title of Paper*. Journal.

**Grants**
- Grant Title, Agency, Years

**Teaching**
- Psychometrics
- Research Methods
- Bayesian Statistics

**Service**
- Reviewer, Journal Name
- Committee Member, Society Name
